content_markdown: In the production of electric power, an advantage of using photovoltaic cells rather than fossil fuels is that the photovoltaic cells

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the image.

options.label: A
options.text: can be effective in any location.

options.label: D
options.text: are more environmentally friendly when in use.

vibe_explanation: Photovoltaic cells produce electricity without emitting greenhouse gases or pollutants during operation, unlike fossil fuels which release $CO_2$ and other particulates. Options A and B are incorrect because solar energy depends on sunlight (location and time of day), and C is incorrect as PV systems typically have high initial capital costs compared to traditional power plants.
